src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/mi.title: Migrate `nx` imports to `@nx/devkit`
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/mi.description: The `nx` package is the CLI, not a public import surface. Move plugin and script imports to `@nx/devkit` so they keep working in future major versions.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.title: Troubleshoot Cache Misses
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.description: Learn how to diagnose and fix issues when Nx tasks are not being replayed from cache as expected, using project configuration checks and Nx Cloud tools.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/ci-exec.title: Understanding "CI Execution Failed"
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/ci-exec.description: Common causes and solutions for CI execution failures in Nx Cloud

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/console.title: Troubleshoot Nx Console Issues
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/console.description: Learn how to resolve common issues with Nx Console, including Node.js version conflicts with nvm and WSL configuration in JetBrains IDEs.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/unknown.title: Unknown Local Cache Error
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/unknown.description: Learn how to troubleshoot and resolve Nx cache errors related to machine ID changes, network drives, and understand how Nx ensures cache security.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.title: Troubleshoot Convert to Inferred Migration
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.description: Learn how to resolve common issues when migrating from executor-based tasks to inferred tasks in Nx, with specific solutions for Next.js, Remix, and other frameworks.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/an.title: Disable Graph Links Created from Analyzing Source Files
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/an.description: Learn how to configure Nx to only use dependencies defined in package.json instead of detecting dependencies from source code analysis.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.title: Include All package.json Files as Projects
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.description: Learn how to configure Nx to include all package.json files as projects in your workspace graph, not just those referenced in workspaces configuration.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/ya.title: Using Yarn Plug'n'Play with Nx
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/ya.description: Learn how to configure and use Yarn Plug'n'Play (PnP) in your Nx workspace to improve installation speed, reduce disk usage, and enforce dependency constraints.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.title: Troubleshoot Nx Installations
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.description: Learn how to resolve common Nx installation issues, including native module problems, platform compatibility, and Node.js architecture mismatches.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/id.title: Identify Dependencies Between Folders
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/id.description: Learn how to analyze and visualize dependencies between folders in your Nx workspace to help identify which code should be extracted into separate libraries.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.title: Including Assets in Your Build
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.description: Learn how to configure Nx executors to include and copy assets into your output bundle using regex patterns or object format for precise control.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/br.title: Configuring Browser Support
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/br.description: Learn how to configure browser compatibility for your Nx applications using browserslist, optimize bundle size with modern browser targets, and debug your browser support configuration.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/perform.title: Profiling Performance
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/perform.description: Learn how to profile and optimize Nx task execution performance using Chrome DevTools and environment variables to identify bottlenecks and improve build times.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/nx-sand.title: Fix Nx Commands Failing in Claude Code Sandbox
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/nx-sand.description: Nx commands fail inside Claude Code sandbox because Unix sockets are blocked. Set allowAllUnixSockets to fix daemon, plugin isolation, and forked process errors.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Console/conso.title: Nx Console Telemetry
src/content/docs/guides/Nx Console/conso.description: Learn about the telemetry data collected by Nx Console extensions, what information is gathered, and how to disable telemetry collection in different editors.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Console/conso.description: Learn how to resolve common issues with Nx Console, including Node.js version conflicts with nvm and WSL configuration in JetBrains IDEs.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Cloud/fix-san.title: Fix sandbox violations

src/content/docs/guides/Tasks & Caching/.description: Learn how to bypass Nx caching mechanism for specific tasks, skip remote caching from Nx Cloud, and reset the cache when needed.

src/content/docs/guides/Tasks & Caching/.title: Workspace Watching
src/content/docs/guides/Tasks & Caching/.description: Learn how to use Nx workspace watching feature to automatically execute commands when files change, improving development workflow and productivity.

src/content/docs/guides/Tasks & Caching/.title: Terminal UI
src/content/docs/guides/Tasks & Caching/.description: Learn how to leverage and configure the Nx Terminal UI when running tasks

src/content/docs/reference/Benchmarks/ts.title: TSC Batch Mode
src/content/docs/reference/Benchmarks/ts.description: Learn how Nx TSC batch mode dramatically improves TypeScript compilation speed by leveraging project references and incremental builds while maintaining DX.

src/content/docs/features/maintain-types.title: Maintain TypeScript Monorepos
src/content/docs/features/maintain-types.description: Learn how Nx simplifies TypeScript monorepo maintenance by auto-configuring tools, managing project references, and enhancing tooling for better monorepo support.

src/content/docs/technologies/typescript.title: Compile TypeScript Libraries to Multiple Formats
src/content/docs/technologies/typescript.description: Learn how to use Nx with Rollup to compile TypeScript libraries to both ESM and CommonJS formats for maximum compatibility.

src/content/docs/technologies/typescript.title: Define Secondary Entry Points for TypeScript Packages
src/content/docs/technologies/typescript.description: Learn how to configure multiple entry points for your TypeScript packages using Nx, allowing consumers to import specific parts of your library.

src/content/docs/technologies/typescript.title: JavaScript and TypeScript
src/content/docs/technologies/typescript.description: Learn how to use Nx with both JavaScript and TypeScript, including how to generate JS files, mix languages in your workspace, and build TypeScript packages with advanced features.

src/content/docs/technologies/typescript.title: Switch to Workspaces and Project References
src/content/docs/technologies/typescript.description: Migrate from TypeScript path aliases to package manager workspaces for project linking, enabling TypeScript project references for better performance.

src/content/docs/concepts/buildable-and-.title: Publishable and Buildable Nx Libraries
src/content/docs/concepts/buildable-and-.description: Learn about buildable and publishable libraries in Nx, when to use them, and how they adjust your project configuration for distribution.

src/content/docs/concepts/typescript-pro.title: TypeScript Project Linking
src/content/docs/concepts/typescript-pro.description: Learn how to efficiently reference code between TypeScript projects in your monorepo using project linking instead of relative paths.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.title: Nx and Angular Versions
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.description: A comprehensive compatibility matrix showing which Nx versions work with different Angular versions, including recommended versions and supported ranges.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.title: Advanced Angular Micro Frontends with Dynamic Module Federation
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.description: Learn how to implement Dynamic Module Federation in Angular applications to achieve "Build once, deploy everywhere" with Nx, enabling runtime determination of remote application locations.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.title: Module Federation with Server-Side Rendering
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.description: Learn how to set up Module Federation with Server-Side Rendering (SSR) for Angular and React applications using Nx generators.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.title: Nx and the Angular CLI
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.description: Compare Nx and Angular CLI features, understand similarities and differences, and learn how Nx enhances Angular development with improved caching, monorepo support, and advanced tooling.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.title: Nx Devkit and Angular Devkit
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.description: Compare Nx Devkit and Angular Devkit for creating generators and executors, understand key differences in implementation, and learn how to convert between the two approaches.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Mi.title: Migrating an Angular CLI Project to Nx
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Mi.description: Learn how to transform your Angular CLI workspace into an Nx workspace, either as a standalone app or a full monorepo, with automated migration tools.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/an.title: Getting Started - Angular Rspack
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/an.description: Learn how to get started with Angular Rspack applications in Nx.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/an.title: Handling Configurations
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/an.description: Guide on how to handle configurations with Angular Rspack

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/an.title: Build-time Internationalization (i18n) with Angular Rspack
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/an.description: Guide on how to use Angular build-time i18n with Angular Rspack

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/an.title: Migrate Angular with Webpack to Rspack
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/an.description: Guide on how to Migrate Angular projects using Webpack to Rspack

src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.title: Adding Images, Fonts, and Files
src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.description: Learn how to import and use assets like images, fonts, and files directly in your Nx projects, including special handling for SVGs in React, Next.js, and Vite applications.

src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.title: Module Federation with Server-Side Rendering
src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.description: Learn how to set up Module Federation with Server-Side Rendering (SSR) for Angular and React applications using Nx generators.

src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.title: React Compiler with Nx
src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.description: Learn how to enable and configure React Compiler in Nx projects to automatically optimize your React code with memoization for better performance.

src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.title: React Router with Nx
src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.description: Learn how to create, build, serve, and test React Router applications within an Nx workspace, leveraging Nx powerful tooling for modern web development.

src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.title: Set Up Application Proxies
src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.description: Learn how to configure proxies for your frontend applications to communicate with backend services during local development, avoiding CORS issues with Webpack, Vite, and Nx executors.

src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.title: Bundling Projects for Deployment
src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.description: Bundle your Node.js application into a single file with no node_modules needed. Deploy without a package.json install step.

src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.title: Pruning Projects for Deployment
src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.description: Generate a pruned package.json and lockfile so Docker installs only production dependencies. Replaces the deprecated generatePackageJson option in Nx 20+.

src/content/docs/technologies/dotnet/Gui.title: Incremental Builds for .NET Projects
src/content/docs/technologies/dotnet/Gui.description: Learn how Nx optimizes .NET builds by leveraging target dependencies and avoiding duplicate compilations.

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Faster Builds with Module Federation
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Learn how Module Federation in Nx enables faster builds by splitting large SPAs into smaller remote applications while minimizing common downsides.

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Manage Library Versions with Module Federation
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Learn how Module Federation's Shared API prevents dependency conflicts and reduces bundle size by managing shared library versions across federated modules.

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Micro Frontend Architecture
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Explore how Nx supports Micro Frontend architecture with Module Federation, enabling independent deployment while managing associated challenges.

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Module Federation and Nx
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Learn how Nx provides out-of-the-box support for Module Federation, making it easier to share code between applications in a monorepo environment.

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Nx Module Federation Technical Overview
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Understand the technical details of how Nx implements Module Federation through executors and webpack configuration utilities.

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Creating a Module Federation Host
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Learn how to generate and configure a host application for Module Federation in React and Angular using Nx generators.

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Creating a Module Federation Remote
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Learn how to generate and configure a remote application for Module Federation in React and Angular using Nx generators.

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Federate a Module
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Learn how to share code between applications at runtime using Module Federation in Nx, including creating and configuring modules to be federated in React and Angular applications.

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: NxModuleFederationDevServerPlugin
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Details about the NxModuleFederationDevServerPlugin and NxModuleFederationSSRDevServerPlugin

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Module Federation Consumer and Provider (v23+)
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Use the new @nx/react:consumer and :provider generators to scaffold React Module Federation apps with Vite, Rsbuild, or Rspack.

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Vite Module Federation
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Set up Module Federation with Vite in an Nx workspace using the @module-federation/vite plugin, with Nx orchestrating the host and remote tasks.

src/content/docs/technologies/eslint/Gui.title: Custom Workspace ESLint Rules
src/content/docs/technologies/eslint/Gui.description: Learn how to create and configure custom ESLint rules specific to your Nx workspace, enabling team-wide code conventions and project-specific linting.

src/content/docs/technologies/eslint/Gui.title: Configuring ESLint with TypeScript
src/content/docs/technologies/eslint/Gui.description: Learn how to properly configure ESLint with TypeScript in your Nx workspace, including setting up type-checking and managing parser options for optimal performance.

src/content/docs/technologies/eslint/Gui.title: Switching to ESLint's Flat Config Format
src/content/docs/technologies/eslint/Gui.description: Learn how to migrate your Nx workspace to ESLint's new flat configuration format, understanding the benefits and implementation details.

src/content/docs/technologies/eslint/esl.title: Enforce Module Boundaries ESLint Rule
src/content/docs/technologies/eslint/esl.description: Learn how to use the @nx/enforce-module-boundaries ESLint rule to define strict rules for accessing resources between different projects in your Nx workspace.

src/content/docs/technologies/build-tool.title: Configure Vite on your Nx workspace
src/content/docs/technologies/build-tool.description: This guide explains how you can configure Vite in your Nx workspace.

src/content/docs/technologies/build-tool.title: Configure Webpack in your Nx workspace
src/content/docs/technologies/build-tool.description: A guide on how to configure webpack on your Nx workspace, and instructions on how to customize your webpack configuration

src/content/docs/technologies/build-tool.title: Webpack plugins
src/content/docs/technologies/build-tool.description: A guide for webpack plugins that are provided by Nx.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Cypress Component Testing
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: Learn how to set up and use Cypress component testing in your Nx workspace for React, Angular, and Next.js projects, including configuration and test execution.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Storybook best practices for making the most out of Nx
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: The purpose of this guide is to help you set up Storybook in your Nx workspace so that you can get the most out of Nx and its powerful capabilities.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: How Storybook is configured on your Nx workspace
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: This guide explains how Storybook is configured on your Nx workspace.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: How to configure Webpack and Vite for Storybook
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: This guide explains how to customize the webpack configuration and your vite configuration for Storybook.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Publishing Storybook - One main Storybook instance for all projects
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: Dive into a comprehensive guide on how to consolidate all your Storybook stories from different projects into one unified Storybook instance. Ideal for Nx workspaces leveraging a single framework.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Publishing Storybook - One Storybook instance per scope
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: Learn how to set up individual Storybook instances for each scope within an Nx workspace. This guide provides a structured approach, emphasizing folder organization and thematic scope separation.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Publishing Storybook - One main Storybook instance using Storybook Composition
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: Dive into the comprehensive guide on publishing a unified Storybook instance from multiple frameworks within an Nx workspace using Storybook Composition.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Set up Storybook for Angular Projects
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: This guide explains how to set up Storybook for Angular projects in your Nx workspace.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Set up Storybook for React Projects
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: This guide explains how to set up Storybook for React projects in your Nx workspace.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Setting up Storybook Composition with Nx
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: Learn how to set up Storybook composition in your Nx workspace to combine multiple Storybook instances into one unified interface.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Setting up Storybook Interaction Tests with Nx
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: This guide shows you how to set up Storybook interaction tests in your Nx workspace and how to run them.
